response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or advanced AI credentials (e.g., Master’s/PhD), and her resume contains significant inconsistencies (name mismatch, fragmented timeline) that raise red flags about credibility.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems design
Active knowledge sharing through workshops and public contributions, indicating leadership potential
concerns: No clear evidence of building or shipping AI/ML products or platforms as required
Resume name (Maria Rodriguez) conflicts with all online profiles (Szabo Bogdan), undermining trust
Lacks documented cloud AI strategy experience, director-level impact, or advanced AI academic credentials
